'''Gamgalon''' was a [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] [[Big game hunter/Legends|big-game hunter]] who also headed a criminal operation on [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]].

==Biography==
During the operation on [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]], Gamgalon ran [[Morodin/Legends|Morodin]]-[[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] safaris that were actually a cover for harvesting [[Aleudrupe berry/Legends|aleudrupe berries]], which could be used to create [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] gas. Unknown to most, the Morodins were actually [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] creatures, making the safaris illegal under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] law. However, Gamgalon had a deal with the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]] in charge of Varonat which kept the hunts from being questioned.<ref name="FC" />

In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Talon Karrde]] went on one of these expeditions, suspicious of Gamgalon's operations. Kaarde and his partner [[Quelev Tapper]] learned of the Morodins' sentience; however, Gamgalon learned of their discovery. To prevent this information from leaking out, Gamgalon, along with his employee [[Falmal]] and three other [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]], detained the duo and later killed Tapper when he attempted to escape. Gamgalon and group led Kaarde through the jungle until Gamgalon, along with Falmal, was killed by [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] with a blaster shot to the torso as she rescued Kaarde.<ref name="FC" />

Gamgalon also once attempted to remove a nine-hundred-meter-long [[Exogorth/Legends|space slug]] from an asteroid in the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]] for a one hundred thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]]—though he foresaw that the difficulty of such an operation may have incurred additional costs.<ref name="EGtAS">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']], p120</ref>
